issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received double tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was applied on March 9.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or delete any outstanding check-in tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria did not include Offer Accepted. The workflow was updated to add Offer Accepted as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a second Offer Accepted transition during the impact window to ensure TCs receive the correct closing tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated workflow emails continued to reference the previous LO's information rather than the newly assigned one. This affected at least one deal where LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. The issue was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any automated agent-facing emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their expected tasks for closing coordination. HAs were sending closing info request emails manually as a result. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix on April 1.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
